mapper.update: UPDATE BT_MEMBER SET PROFILE = #{profile} WHERE USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BT_MEMBER WHERE USERNAME = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BT_MEMBER WHERE NICK_NAME = #{nick_name}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BT_MEMBER(USERNAME, PASSWORD, ROLE, COURSE, NAME, NICK_NAME, AGE, GENDER, EMAIL, PROFILE, ENABLED, USER_CODE) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{course}, #{name}, #{nick_name}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{email}, #{profile}, #{enabled}, #{user_code})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BT_MEMBER WHERE ROLE != 'ADMIN'
